name: @textfilters/spam
description: Lightweight TypeScript anti-spam guard for chat moderation: interval, duplicate, burst, and actor-based message checks.

scripts.lint: prettier README.md docs package.json src tests --check
scripts.format: prettier README.md docs package.json src tests --write
scripts.smoke:dist: node --input-type=module --eval "const spam = await import('./dist/index.js'); spam.createSpamFilter().check({ text: 'ok' });"
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm test && npm run build && npm run smoke:dist && npm run pack:dry-run
